tests.step: App loads — visit / (signed out); redirects to /login without console errors.
Sign in — a valid lodge/org user signs in and lands on the dashboard.
Dashboard renders — stat cards (Revenue, AR, Open Jobs, Win Rate) load, no error boundary tripped.
CRM sub-tabs render — Properties (first), Contacts, Companies, Opportunities, Pipeline, Jobs; Main Menu returns to standard nav.
Site survey wizard opens — /site-surveys/mobile renders Step 1 of 6 (Property).
Estimates / Invoices / Jobs lists load without errors.
Sign out — user menu lands on /login; no leaked session on back.
/settings hub loads for admin — sidebar renders, no error boundary.
No-org user at /onboard sees org-setup form (org name required), can submit.
Signed-out routes redirect — a dashboard URL while signed out redirects to /login (proxy.ts).
Login valid — correct email+password signs in and redirects to intended page.
Login wrong password — clear error, no session created.
Signup creates org+onboarding — new email signs up; onboarding org-create RPC succeeds (SE17).
Invited user reaches signup via proxy invite-token exception; org association depends on an email-matched pending invite (invite_token metadata is unused server-side).
Forgot / reset password flow completes end to end.
Session refresh survives reload — chunked sb-auth-token cookies keep the session across a hard refresh.
Normal logout calls supabase.auth.signOut(); VERIFY whether any sb-* localStorage keys linger afterward (potential session-leak; only the invite path purges them).
Authenticated user hitting /signup is redirected away (except with invite token).
Login blank email/password → inline required errors, NO Supabase call.
Login with Supabase env unset → "Setup Required" banner, no inputs.
Signup password <8 → inline error, blocks signUp.
Signup password≠confirm → "Passwords do not match", blocked.
Signup on confirm-required project → /login?message=Check your email.
Fresh non-invited signup w/ session → /onboard; invited → /.
Duplicate-email signup → destructive toast, no new account.
Invite link opened with DIFFERENT email → no org, routed /onboard (invite matching email-based; invite_token metadata unused server-side).
Expired invitation at signup → treated as no invite; /onboard, no org.
Forgot-password anti-enumeration — unknown email = identical "Check your email"/200.
Reset-password with no recovery session → updateUser error toast.
Successful reset signs out, redirects /login (re-login with new pw).
Expired/reused recovery token at /auth/confirm → /login?error=link_expired.
/auth/confirm missing token_hash/type → /login?error=invalid_link.
OAuth callback no/invalid code → /login?error=auth_callback_error; no-org → /onboard; else honors ?next.
Second org-creation by user with org → RPC raises "already belongs to an organization", no dup.
No-org non-platform user on dashboard → /onboard; platform user w/o org NOT redirected.
Authenticated user hitting /login or /forgot-password → proxy redirect / (AU9 only covers /signup).
/crm/properties first CRM sub-tab, lists properties; tab renders + loads.
Address/city/state/zip search (debounced 300ms); empty state "No properties yet…".
Column sort toggles asc/desc; page resets to 1.
Pagination Next enabled on exactly-full 25-row page (hasNext=length===25) → empty page. BUG.
Row shows Res/Comm badge from property_type + "current/N past" contacts + job_count.
Detail splits Current vs "Previously at this address" by is_current with role badges.
"Moved away" sets moved_out_date (+note), moves contact to Previous.
Work history lists jobs/opps/surveys cross-linked; retained regardless of current owner.
Notes Save gated by dirty flag; inline property_type Select persists immediately.
Create residential contact — required first name + address; name computed from first+last; no company created.
Commercial contact auto-creates company — new company name creates a company row; companies list invalidated.
Commercial contact links existing company (case-insensitive) — no duplicate company created.
Required-field validation — blank first name/street/city/state/zip blocks save with inline errors.
Commercial requires Company; residential does not.
Switching a contact Commercial→Residential clears company_name, company_id, and contact_role (job title is NOT cleared).
Email format validated; empty allowed.
Address read-only on edit for non-admins; admins can edit; new contact always editable.
Delete contact with linked surveys — dialog warns surveys will be unlinked (not deleted); confirm unlinks + deletes contact.
Search filters name/company/email/phone (debounced); Type + Status filters; Clear resets.
Advanced filters (no-contact-90d, has-open-jobs) narrow the list; open-jobs badge shows count.
Bulk actions apply only to selected rows; selection clears on filter/page change.
CSV import — only First Name required; business/commercial coerced to commercial; rows without first name skipped.
Contact detail Opportunities tab is a placeholder — no data even with opps. STUB.
Inline status change; current status disabled; no-op when unchanged.
Overview notes timestamped [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM]; legacy note = "Original Note".
Log Call POSTs /api/activity/manual (type=call, direction default outbound; duration coerced).
Set Follow-up requires date; past-due next_followup_date renders red.
Bulk Change Status defaults 'prospect' (non-neutral).
Bulk Assign Owner __unassigned__→null; owner label falls back to email.
Bulk Export CSV immediate client download (10 cols; phone mobile→office→phone; CRLF).
CSV import dedups by email vs existing org contacts AND within batch; dups skipped w/ reason.
CSV import bulk-insert failure retries each row individually.
CSV import rejects >5000 rows; posts in chunks of 100.
Contact list Next enabled on exactly-full 25-row page (length-based). BUG.
Segment builder — name required; default status='active'; last rule not removable; ALL/AND; /customers/segments route likely broken vs /crm.
Activity feed spans contact + linked surveys/estimates/proposals/jobs.
No direct create — /crm/companies has no New Company button; companies come from the commercial contact flow.
Company appears after a commercial contact is created with a new company name.
Edit requires name; emptied fields save as null; redirect to detail with toast.
Primary-contact picker only lists contacts linked to that company; can be cleared.
State auto-uppercases (maxLength 2) on billing/service address.
Search + status/type/industry filters; default sort name asc; Clear resets.
Delete a company with linked contacts/jobs — deletion succeeds; UI not orphaned; lists/stats invalidate.
Company detail Contacts tab filters client-side over only first 100 contacts — >100 truncate. BUG.
Company detail Opportunities tab is a placeholder stub.
Inline notes edit saves via updateCompany; website normalized to prepend https://.
Company list sortable columns; activity filter uses updated_at proxy.
"Add Contact" deep link (?newContact=true&company=) not consumed — dead link.
Required fields — missing contact/name/stage blocks create; server requires customer_id, name, stage_id.
Auto name = Who_Hazard_date; custom name disables auto; Reset-to-auto restores.
Service address auto-fills from the selected contact when blank.
Hazard types persist (regression) — hazard_types array saved and chips render.
Weighted value = estimated value times stage probability; kept in sync on edit.
Default stage excludes won/lost; dropdown shows color + probability.
Mark Won on opportunity detail sets outcome/status/actual_close_date only; stage badge and weighted_value stay put (no stage move/history on this path).
Mark Lost on opportunity detail captures reason/competitor/notes/followup; does NOT move stage or write opportunity_history.
Move Stage records opportunity_history (from/to, changed_by) + activity.
Delete opportunity has NO reachable UI on the detail page (OpportunityActions is unwired) — verify no delete control is exposed.
List search (name only) + Status/Urgency/Location filters; urgency badge colors.
Mark Won (detail) sets outcome/status/actual_close_date but NOT stage/weighted/history/activity — badge stays stale. BUG.
"Convert to Job" only when outcome=won && !job_id; RPC convert_opportunity_to_job → /jobs/{id}; winning alone never creates job.
Convert to Job idempotent — 2nd convert returns existing job, no dup.
Converted job defaults status=scheduled, start=today, assigned null, address opp→customer→"Address pending".
"Convert to Survey" (open && !created_from_assessment_id) creates draft survey, flips to assessment_scheduled.
Mark Lost captures reason/competitor/notes/followup; detail LOSS_REASONS snake_case differ from Actions set — stored value varies by entry.
Edit two-phase — stage change POSTs /move first then PATCH; PATCH failure no rollback of move. BUG.
Edit drops extra hazards — hazard_type=hazard_types[0]; multi-hazard loses rest. BUG.
List stats — count global but Total/Weighted sum current page only.
Drag-and-drop moves a card — optimistic move, POST /api/pipeline/[id]/move, toast, board refresh; same-column drop is a no-op.
Failed move rolls back to original column with destructive toast; prior moves preserved.
Move-to menu mirrors drag logic; current stage excluded; click doesn't start a drag.
Per-org active stages only, ordered by sort_order; other orgs' stages never appear.
Drop into Won/Lost column sets outcome + actual_close_date; card stays visible (includeClosed).
Header metric cards are OPEN-pipeline only, so board sums (incl. closed) can legitimately differ.
Owner/date/stage/location filters narrow cards; empty stage selection = all.
Kanban loads all opps (limit 1000); owner/date/stage filters client-side; empty stage set = all columns.
Move writes opportunity_history + status_changed activity + auto DB-trigger activity (double log).
Drag/move-menu send no notes; column header total sums visible cards only.
Kanban lazy-loaded ssr:false, 5-col skeleton, DataErrorBoundary.
Jobs list — jobs created via /jobs/new AND via Convert-to-Job from a won opportunity; empty-state copy is aspirational, not literal.
Review Queue button only shows for canManageTenant() (admins).
Search matches job number/address/tech-on-crew; Status/hazard/date filters; URL-seeded filters from dashboard drill-down.
Jobs LIST payment-status badge derived (Paid/Overdue/Invoiced/Deposit/Pending Invoice/Not Yet Billed); the detail page differs (see I15).
Update Status modal excludes 'Completed' (routed via Complete Job); disabled when unchanged.
Complete Job button shows only for scheduled/in_progress/on_hold; opens /jobs/[id]/complete (full flow).
Status change goes through role-gated POST /api/jobs/[id]/status (TENANT_WRITE); read/field roles get 403; fires activity/SMS/commission.
Detail tabs — Financials shows est-vs-actual variance + margin; Documents shows required-doc checklist; cross-links to company/contact/opportunity.
Job touch source/medium/campaign set by direct assignment (overwrite) and only when opportunity_id is present; a direct job inherits nothing (see JB19-JB21).
CRM jobs list Next enabled on exactly-full 25-row page. BUG.
Payment-status badge diverges — list 7 states incl Overdue, detail 4 (no Overdue); same job differs. BUG.
CRM detail "Assign Crew" permanently disabled — dead control.
CRM detail Activity tab is a stub.
Documents checklist derives 8 items; N/A excluded from "X of Y required" denominator.
/jobs/new requires customer+name+address+technician; address auto-fills from customer; survey picker scoped to customer.
Job-from-proposal requires signed/accepted else VALIDATION_ERROR.
Status change fires SMS (arrived, completed) + auto-creates commission on completion — idempotent both paths.
Review Queue TENANT_ADMIN-gated (estimator→redirect); lists only status='submitted' oldest-first.
Attribution — job without opportunity_id inherits NO touch attribution (trigger gated on opp_id NOT NULL).
Attribution — job.company_id backfilled from opp when null, independent of touch inheritance.
Attribution — opp inherits only first_touch from contact/company via COALESCE; last/converting not set at opp level.
Wizard loads 6 sections (Property, Access, Environment, Hazards, Photos, Review); progress dots + Step X of 6.
Next/Back buttons navigate between sections; Back hidden on first section.
Section validation is advisory during wizard navigation (Next still advances); enforced only at Submit; Review shows 'N of 5 complete'.
Photos — capture/library upload queues photos; thumbnails persist when the next photo is taken (no blanking).
Auto-save every 30s when dirty; manual Save works; last-saved indicator updates.
Offline draft persists to localStorage and survives tab background/return (rehydrate, photos not blanked).
Resume a saved draft OFFLINE via /site-surveys/mobile?surveyId={id} — app shell opens (does not show You're Offline).
Offline-sync conflict detection — concurrent edits prompt Use Latest / Keep Mine (X12).
Submit waits via waitForUploads (120s timeout); remaining failures block submit with 'N photo(s) failed to upload' and offer Discard-failed.
Swipe forward/back between steps navigates — including a swipe released over the fixed footer.
Next advances even when section invalid — handleNext only LOGS validateSection; Next blocked only by in-flight photo uploads.
Photos section needs ≥4 EXTERIOR photos specifically; videos excluded from count; no max.
After R2 upload, survey-store dataUrl+blob AND queue localUri released, path/stamped_path set so thumbnail still renders — memory-dup regression guard.
localStorage partialize strips blob/dataUrl; queue persists only uploaded rows with localUri='' — no QuotaExceeded / blank-white on return.
Video capture requires online, rejects >250MB, bypasses offline queue (uploads synchronously).
Photo upload retries 3× with 2/4/8s backoff, max 2 concurrent.
Upload-url rejects disallowed MIME + duplicate photoId per survey.
Photo capture refused until org + surveyId ready ("Still loading…"/"Survey isn't ready…").
Conflict resolution — "Discard mine" reloads server; "Keep my version" force-overwrites server; dialog has no dismiss.
Offline saveDraft keeps isDirty=true so reconnect auto-sync pushes edits + runs conflict check.
Exit dialog always appears even when clean (Continue/Discard/Save&Exit).
Submit waits via waitForUploads (120s timeout); remaining failures block submit "N photo(s) failed…", offer Discard failed.
Offline resume of a mobile URL never visited online → /offline "You're Offline" (negative branch of SS7/HS2).
EXIF extracted before compression, EXIF GPS overrides live geo; images compressed ≤2MB.
Auto-estimate on submit is best-effort + idempotent, does NOT flip survey to 'estimated' (stays 'submitted').
Create-from-survey yields a pending_approval estimate (L2 required), NOT a draft; the manual POST /api/estimates path flips the survey to 'estimated'.
New estimate requires project_name only (customer optional); markup defaults to 20.
Add line item — total = qty times unit_price; estimate subtotal/markup/tax/total recompute.
Line-item validation — qty>0, unit_price>=0, description required.
Line items locked once estimate is approved/sent/accepted (editable in draft + pending_approval only).
Pricing math — markup on subtotal, then discount, then tax on (subtotal+markup-discount); flat discount overrides percent; excluded items don't count.
Submit draft to pending_approval; two-level approval ALWAYS required for estimates.
L1 approval by admin+; final L2 approval only by tenant_owner/platform; estimator/technician get 403.
L2 final approval flips estimate to approved then auto-creates+sends proposal; estimate becomes 'sent'.
Rejection at L1/L2 sends estimate back to draft with notes; requester notified.
Approval queue shows only actionable items per role (L2 only to owners).
Delete estimate is admin-gated (estimator blocked); cascades line items.
Create-from-survey lands in pending_approval (NOT draft) with L2 required; can't re-submit (draft-only guard).
DB trigger applies discount% to (subtotal+markup) and IGNORES flat discount_amount — diverges from TS recompute. Regression guard.
Line-item add/edit/delete routes have NO allowedRoles gate — viewer/technician can mutate line items.
Line-item status lock is API-only not RLS — raw write can modify line items on approved/sent estimate.
Create revised version — copies header+items to new draft, version=MAX+1 per root; "Version X of Y" badge + superseded banner.
Revision line-item copy failure → compensating delete of orphan revision, then rethrow.
At most one v1 (parent-less) estimate per survey; revisions exempt.
List include=latest (default) = latest per chain; include=all = every version.
Two-level approval atomic — record_estimate_approval RPC updates request + status in one txn under RLS.
Best-effort recompute swallows failures — mutation succeeds, stored totals can go stale.
Calculator per-category math — labor daysPerWorker=ceil(hrs/8), sup $680/tech $440; travel once; disposal by volume; testing only if clearance; permits only if notification.
Area fallback: area_sqft → linear_ft×2 → volume_cuft/8 → default 100.
Public v1 estimates diverges from internal — total_amount/line_total cols, draft, EST-00001 numbering.
Generate proposal from an approved/sent estimate — 201, proposal_number + 32-byte access_token, 30-day expiry; estimate to sent.
Cannot CREATE a proposal from an unapproved estimate — POST /api/proposals returns VALIDATION_ERROR unless the estimate is approved/sent.
Access-token failure is not swallowed (no NULL token; portal unusable otherwise).
Auto-proposal on final estimate approval emails the customer portal link; if no customer email, stays draft (not sent).
Send proposal email — draft/sent only; returns portal_url; email only if RESEND_API_KEY set; attaches credential docs.
Public portal view is token-gated, no login; unknown token to NOT_FOUND.
Viewing a sent proposal marks it viewed (viewed_at, viewed_count increments).
Expired token blocks view + sign with a clear message.
Portal shows only included line items grouped by type; summary math (service fee/discount/tax/total).
Customer signs (name+email+drawn signature); proposal signed; estimate to accepted.
Cannot double-sign / sign wrong status; expired token rejected on sign.
Signing auto-creates a placeholder job (scheduled, start=today+3); idempotent; NULL customer skips gracefully.
Verbal approval (admin only) marks signed with method=verbal + note; estimate to accepted.
Proposal-signed notification to creator (best-effort; failure doesn't block signing).
Proposal content NOT template-rendered — templates are docs only; no {{variable}}/hazard selection.
No decline/reject path — portal has no decline button/endpoint.
Manual convert-to-job (POST /api/jobs/from-proposal, must be signed|accepted) flips proposal→'converted' via RPC, unique_violation on concurrent — distinct from sign-trigger placeholder job.
Portal GET returns whitelisted columns only — signer_email/ip/signature_data never exposed to public token endpoint.
Send attaches estimate docs as 14-day signed URLs; email failure swallowed but status flips to 'sent'.
Verbal approval requires note (1-2000 chars), allows backdating approved_at, sets approval_method='verbal'.
PATCH /api/proposals/[id] has no status state-machine guard — can set arbitrary status on any org proposal.
DELETE proposal is TENANT_ADMIN-only, org-scoped; estimator/viewer blocked.
No portal PDF download endpoint for proposals (invoices have one; proposals HTML only).
Regulatory fees static prose only — no code computes/enforces 10-day DNR wait.
proposal_number falls back to PRO-${Date.now()} when RPC null; access_token error NOT swallowed (throws).
/invoices lists org invoices with derived stat cards (Outstanding/Overdue/Drafts/Paid); 25/page.
Overdue badge is derived (due_date past + balance_due>0 + not paid/void), not stored.
Create invoice from a completed job — line items from job + change orders; job to invoiced.
Job-completion auto-invoice fires on all completion paths (DB trigger convergence): review-approval, status PATCH, and the v1 API raw write (pair with J22 commission gap).
Completed job with no billable amount produces no invoice.
Record a payment recalculates balance/status; full payment to paid.
Overpayment is blocked only client-side (dialog); the server/RPC does NOT compare amount to balance_due (see I14 for the gap).
Delete a recorded payment recalculates balance; server DELETE is admin-only.
Non-admin write actions are hidden in the invoice DETAIL HEADER and rejected by API; note list/data-table + delete-payment controls are NOT UI-gated (see I16/I17).
Customer invoice portal link — token valid 90 days, reused while valid, regenerated when expired.
Send invoice by email; SMS only when customer opted-in + phone on file.
Void invoice — confirm dialog; excluded from Outstanding/Overdue math.
List search/status filters are page-local — visible rows can be fewer than the header count (gotcha).
Server does NOT reject overpayment — POST /payments amount>balance succeeds → negative balance + status='paid' (only browser blocks). BUG.
Job DETAIL payment status differs from list (deposit checked before invoiced, no Overdue); same job shows different label.
Delete-payment trash button renders for non-admins (not gated); click → generic "Failed to delete". UI-gate gap.
Data-table row Send/Void actions render for non-admins (detail header hides them); API still rejects. UI-gate gap.
QB invoice sync POST has NO allowedRoles → any tenant user can trigger QB sync. BUG.
Row "Record Payment" ?record_payment=true not read by detail — dialog does NOT auto-open.
Invoice edit locked once not draft — assertDraftEditable → 409, backed by DB triggers.
createFromJob rejects non-completed job → VALIDATION_ERROR, re-checked under row lock in RPC.
'overdue' selectable in status filter but never stored → filtering Overdue returns zero rows.
Invoice line gen: base = contract_amount ?? final_amount + one line per APPROVED change order (gated include_change_orders).
Due-terms order: due_days > company payment_terms (Net N) > commercial 30d/residential 15d.
Public portal GET /api/portal/invoice/[token] unauthenticated, allowlisted fields via SECDEF RPC; unknown/expired handled.
Complete Job (from CRM) routes into the full completion flow with Time/Materials/Equipment/Photos/Checklist/Review tabs.
Log materials used (name + quantity + unit cost) — saves via material-usage API.
Generate + view a work order for a job (Work Order tab); loads without 'Failed to load work order'.
Log equipment used — saves to job_equipment.
Completion notes (field notes / issues / recommendations) accept and save text.
Submit completion shows the variance analysis review page.
Office reviewer can approve / request changes — approve/reject on the review page (admin-gated); central Review Queue lists all submitted completions.
Actual vs estimated HOURS shown with % + Overrun/Under-est label.
Actual vs estimated MATERIALS shown like-for-like (not estimate-total vs material-actual).
Over-budget flagged (red + 'Over budget' text label).
Under-budget noted (green + 'Under budget' text label).
Time tab — log time entry (hours+date) POST /time-entries → job_time_entries; currently untested.
Photos tab — capture/upload multipart /photos/upload → job_completion_photos + storage.
Checklist tab — items force-init on load; toggle PATCHes /checklist/[itemId].
Submit POST /complete has NO allowedRoles — technician/viewer can create+submit; only approve/reject admin-gated. BUG.
v1 API PATCH (raw admin write) can set status='completed' — invoice trigger fires but commission NEVER generated (no DB trigger); actual_end_at/SMS/activity skipped. CO2 gap.
Reject completion non-atomic, leaves job status UNCHANGED (vs approve atomic RPC); requires non-empty reason.
Dual-FK embed regression — job-variance-service.ts:52 + estimator-accuracy-service.ts:29 embed jobs!inner WITHOUT !job_completions_job_id_fkey hint → PGRST201 risk.
Review-page material variance (like-for-like) DISAGREES with Review-Queue cost variance (material-only vs full contract_amount, legacy RPC).
Primary variance RPC writes nonexistent material_variance cols → 42703; service silently falls back to legacy RPC.
gross_margin_pct + job_completions.actual_total never populated → actual_cost always null, margin never renders. Dead columns.
getVarianceSummary buckets ±5% vs review UI ±10% — counts disagree with row colors.
Variance divide-by-zero: est=0 → percent null, UI "—"; confirm no NaN/Infinity leaks.
Completion page 6 tabs in grid-cols-5 TabsList → Review trigger overflows row. UI bug.
Stat cards — Revenue (earned, not cash), Outstanding AR, Open Jobs, Win Rate; skeletons while loading.
Card drill-through — Revenue to /jobs, AR to /invoices?status=outstanding, Open Jobs to /crm/jobs, Win Rate to /sales/win-loss (filters preserved).
Period filter (Week/Month/Quarter/YTD, default YTD) re-scopes cards/charts; trends vs prior equal window.
Hazard filter re-scopes via survey hazard_type; zero-match yields empty (sentinel), not unfiltered.
AR trend uses inverted color polarity (rising AR = red).
Overdue Invoices widget uses org-timezone 'today' (no UTC off-by-one).
Widget error isolation — one failing widget doesn't blank the others.
platform_owner sees 'Platform Dashboard' + full-access banner.
Win Rate denominator = ALL proposals in window (won=signed), NOT won/(won+lost); draft/sent dilute rate.
Revenue card per-job = actual_revenue ?? final_amount ?? contract_amount for completed/invoiced/paid/closed, by scheduled_start_date.
Open Jobs counts scheduled/in_progress/on_hold by scheduled_start_date — won't reconcile with donut total.
AR trend mixes methods — current = sum(balance_due) vs prior RPC = sum(total−payments); apples-to-oranges.
Revenue trend chart independent of period filter (fixed 6mo); jobs-by-hazard ignores hazard filter — must NOT re-scope.
AR drill /invoices?status=outstanding vs Overdue widget /invoices?status=overdue — divergent params.
Calendar loads 5 event sources (jobs, surveys, deadlines, external Google, industry); one source failing falls back to empty.
Month/Week/Day + prev/next + Today navigation; title updates; empty day states.
Finished events (completed/invoiced/paid/cancelled/no_show) hidden until 'Completed' chip toggled.
Event-type chips + team-member filter (member filter hides deadlines/external/industry).
Event detail sheet with type-specific drill-through (View Job/Survey, Open in Google, registration link).
Local-date parsing — a job scheduled for a date renders on that day, not the day before (no UTC off-by-one).
Multi-day event bands render continuously with +N more overflow.
Calendar is READ-ONLY — no create/edit form, NO drag-reschedule; scheduling only in jobs/new, jobs/[id]/edit, survey modal. CRUD/drag tests will fail.
15-min granularity via custom TimeSelect dropdown (96 opts), NOT native <input type=time step=900> — ZERO native time inputs in codebase (contradicts project rule). Used job new/edit, survey modal.
"Completed" chip tooltip claims cancelled shown, but cancelled excluded server-side — toggling can't reveal cancelled.
Regulatory-deadline events only from asbestos jobs, 10 working days before start (Sat/Sun skipped); only in-window render.
Google all-day exclusive end corrected (end=addDays(rawEnd,-1)); external timed use parseISO.
Team list is org- and active-scoped; sortable columns.
Team management gated to admins (Invite/menus hidden for non-admins).
Invite a member — 7-day token invitation; appears under Pending; email only if RESEND_API_KEY set (silent otherwise).
Duplicate invite / existing member to 409; no duplicate.
Revoke a pending invitation (org-scoped).
Role edit — cannot act on own row; only owner-like can assign tenant_owner.
Deactivate (soft-delete) a member — sign-in revoked, history preserved.
Billing admin-only; billing_managed_externally redirects to /settings; else shows subscription + plan + Stripe invoices.
BUG — Create API Key navigates to /settings/api/new which does not exist (404). No UI creates a key.
BUG — Revoke calls DELETE /api/api-keys/[id] which has no route (fails). Key not revoked.
API key list masks the key (prefix only); full key shown once at creation only.
QuickBooks connect/disconnect OAuth; Company ID + last sync shown; last_error surfaced.
BUG — QuickBooks 'Sync All' button has no handler (inert).
Roles matrix is read-only + admin-gated; non-admin redirected.
Non-admin /settings sidebar shows only Notifications + Security; admin items hidden.
Direct load of admin sub-page (/settings/company) as technician → server redirect /settings.
BUG — /settings/credentials has NO server admin gate (no layout.tsx); technician gets 200 render.
Team "Send password reset" → POST /api/team/[id]/send-password-reset; email unconfigured → sent:false + toast.
Deactivate member = soft-delete (is_active=false); hidden, jobs preserved, sign-in revoked.
Cannot act on own team row — menu disabled, API FORBIDDEN "use your own profile settings".
GAP — no self-serve profile page; team redirects self-edits to /settings/profile which doesn't exist; no avatar UI.
/settings/company validation — empty name blocked, photo_retention_days 90–3650, state auto-upper 2 chars.
/settings/sms — master toggle, quiet-hours, brand prefix ≤24, Twilio E.164; Test SMS ignores toggle/quiet-hours, needs ≥10 digits.
/settings/notifications NOT admin-gated; per-user In-App/Email PATCH; Push disabled; admin "Configure for" user picker edits another member.
/settings/security password change every role (min8+confirm); 2FA/Sessions placeholders.
/settings/email custom-domain auto-polls 10s while pending; test send via /api/organizations/me/email-test.
Integrations QuickBooks panel shows Company ID + Last Synced; last_error → destructive Alert; ?error → toast + URL clean.
Billing — no sub → "No Active Subscription"; trialing → Trial Ends; Manage Billing → POST /api/billing/portal → Stripe URL.
Revoke pending invitation with spoofed cross-org id → 404 NOT_FOUND.
Missing/invalid Authorization header to 401; only 'Bearer ' accepted.
Wrong key format (not hzd_live_) to 401 'Invalid key format'; unknown key to 401 'Invalid API key'.
Revoked / inactive / expired key each rejected with its specific 401 message.
Scope enforced on read — key without customers:read to 403 'Missing required scope: customers:read'.
Scope enforced on write — read-only key POST to 403 customers:write; cross-resource scope isolation (customers key on /companies to 403).
Org-scoping of reads — Org A key never returns Org B rows; GET-by-id for another org's id to 404 (every query hard-filters organization_id).
customers/[id] cross-org/unknown id: GET & PATCH → 404; DELETE → 200 {success:true} but deletes nothing (missing affected-row check — candidate bug).
Per-key hourly quota to 429 'Rate limit exceeded' with X-RateLimit headers; resets after 1h.
Per-IP public limiter (60/min) applies to customers & companies COLLECTION routes only (estimates/invoices/jobs + [id] routes have only the per-key hourly quota — see API23).
Pagination bounds — limit 1..100 (101/0 to 400); has_more flag + total echoed; default limit 50.
Search sanitized (no injection); invalid JSON to 400; body validation errors return details; invalid UUID path to 400.
OPTIONS preflight to 204 with allowed methods + Max-Age; prod restricts origin to app URL (no wildcard, credentials:false).
Internal errors return generic message (no SQL/stack leaked); last_used_at updated + request logged.
GET /api/v1/estimates without estimates:read → 403 "Missing required scope: estimates:read"; with scope returns org-scoped list + {total,limit,offset,has_more}.
POST /api/v1/estimates with cross-org customer_id → 404 "Customer not found"; valid create → 201, status 'draft', line_items inserted, total_amount = Σ qty×unit_price.
POST /api/v1/estimates with foreign/unknown site_survey_id → 404 "Site survey not found".
GET/POST /api/v1/invoices enforce invoices:read/write (403 exact msg); POST cross-org customer_id → 404, cross-org job_id → 404; created invoice status 'draft', tax 0, balance=subtotal.
GET/POST /api/v1/jobs enforce jobs:read/write; POST cross-org customer_id → 404; new job status 'pending', hazard_types defaults [] when omitted.
jobs/[id] & companies/[id] PATCH/DELETE org-hard-filtered; another org's id → 404 on GET/PATCH.
Entity-number RACE — EST/INV/JOB-#### are count()+1 with no txn/uniqueness; two concurrent POSTs collide → dup number or insert error.
PostgREST .or() filter injection — search on /v1/customers & /v1/companies; sanitizeSearchQuery escapes only %,_,\ not ',' or ')'. search=`a,email.ilike.%25` must NOT widen results.
Collection GET /v1/customers uses select('*') vs curated [id] columns; confirm '*' doesn't leak internal columns.
Per-IP 'public' limiter (60/min) only on customers/companies COLLECTION; estimates/invoices/jobs + all [id] routes have only per-key hourly quota. 61 rapid /v1/estimates NOT IP-throttled.
Memory rate-limit fallback is per-instance when Upstash unset → per-lambda not global. Verify Redis configured in prod.
Non-numeric limit/offset → 400 "Invalid query parameters"; limit=101 or 0 → 400; default 50.
Resend webhook verifies svix signature (HMAC over id.timestamp.body, timingSafeEqual); wrong/missing signature to 401.
Webhook fails CLOSED in production without RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET (500); lenient (accepts unsigned) only in dev.
Webhook updates only the email_sends row matching provider_message_id (no cross-tenant write); unknown id to 200 skipped.
Status transitions (delivered/bounced/complained) + open/click counters (first_opened_at only once); unknown types to 200 ack (no retries); webhook rate-limited (200/min).
Invoice email sends to customer with invoice PDF + attached docs; marks status='sent'; requires a customer email (else VALIDATION_ERROR).
SMS path gated by sms_opt_in + org SMS + payment_reminders; schedules reminders (future only); cancelled on pay/void.
Invitation create sends invite email with /signup?invite=token (7-day expiry); email failure does NOT fail the request; duplicates to 409.
Proposal-signed notifies proposal.created_by (best-effort; failure never blocks signing).
Notifications respect per-user in-app + email preferences; no email if user has no email address.
email_sends audit row + resolved sender apply to EmailService-routed sends (invoice/proposal/notification); invitations are the exception (raw send, no audit — see EM12).
Event to recipient matrix correct (job_assigned to assignee, completion-review to admins, invoice_paid to owner, feedback to admins).
Invitation email BYPASSES EmailService (raw resend.emails.send, from notifications@RESEND_DOMAIN||resend.dev, NO email_sends audit row). Verify no audit row + non-tenant sender.
Notification email DEFAULT-ON — no pref row → both in-app + email sent. Brand-new user still receives emails.
Invoice send schedules 3 SMS reminders at due−3/due/due+3 @10:00, skipping past times; requires phone+sms_opt_in+org sms_enabled+payment_reminders_enabled.
Invoice email attaches rendered PDF + job documents + lab_reports; single attachment fail skips only that file; PDF-gen fail still sends body.
Webhook first_clicked_at set once (click_count===0), increments click_count, no last_clicked_at on click. Verify counter semantics.
Invoice send with no customer → BAD_REQUEST "Invoice has no customer"; no email/SMS/status change.
Org A cannot read Org B data — org-scoped SELECT returns zero cross-org rows (RLS via get_user_organization_id).
Viewer cannot write jobs via a raw browser Supabase client (RLS UPDATE requires a write role). Regression guard: viewer previously could change job status/amount.
Technician cannot write jobs/invoices/payments at the DB (read-only at RLS); cannot fabricate a payment row (fake 'paid').
RLS is role-scoped AND org-scoped — a write-role in Org A cannot write Org B (WITH CHECK enforces both).
Role groups correct — TENANT_WRITE excludes technician/viewer; TENANT_FIELD adds technician; TENANT_ADMIN = platform+tenant_owner+admin.
Viewer/estimator blocked from TENANT_ADMIN API routes (invitations, settings) to 403.
Unauthenticated internal API to UNAUTHORIZED; unauthenticated dashboard route to 307 redirect to /login.
Server-side role gate on admin pages — direct URL load by a non-admin redirects (no URL-bypass of UI gating); no org to /onboard.
Chunked auth cookie (sb-ref-auth-token.0/.1) recognized as authenticated (match includes '-auth-token'); no false /login redirect.
Public routes (/api/v1, /api/webhooks, /portal, /feedback, /api/proposals/sign, /auth/*) bypass the login redirect and authenticate by key/token/signature.
/signup?invite=token strips a stale session so the invitee registers clean.
Input sanitized on internal APIs by default; Zod errors to VALIDATION_ERROR (field named); malformed JSON to BAD_REQUEST.
Rate limiting — general 100/min, auth 10/min per IP to 429 with headers.
RLS helper functions are SECURITY DEFINER with search_path=public pinned. Regression guard: empty search_path previously broke all org RLS.
platform_owner retains cross-org access via separate FOR ALL policies; platform_admin is DENIED cross-org on invoices/payments (see SEC22) — not uniform.
Secure error handler hides internals (no stack/SQL to client); profile-not-found to NOT_FOUND.
RLS HOLE — opportunities & pipeline_stages org-only, NO role gate; viewer/technician CAN INSERT/UPDATE via raw client, bypassing /api/pipeline RBAC.
WITH CHECK both-sided on jobs/invoices/payments UPDATE — estimator can't org-hop or drop org predicate.
estimates/proposals/estimate_line_items INSERT+UPDATE org-only at RLS (RBAC only in API); DELETE admin/owner-gated.
api_keys RLS org-only (any member INSERT/DELETE via raw client) while API gates TENANT_ADMIN — mismatch.
Pricing tables RLS lets estimator manage but /api/settings/pricing gates TENANT_ADMIN — divergent.
platform_admin cross-org invoices/payments DENIED (policy names only platform_owner); inconsistency.
Admin-only address-change trigger — non-admin UPDATE of address cols on customers/companies/jobs/opps/surveys/properties → 42501.
Photo storage isolation — survey-photos SELECT foldername[1]=own org; originals/ admin-only read; cross-org denied.
anon rpc is_platform_user/get_user_organization_id → permission denied (SECDEF grants revoked from anon).
One org per user — allow_first_org_creation blocks 2nd org INSERT for non-platform.
Finalized-invoice lock — UPDATE of paid/void invoice denied at RLS.
Reporting matviews revoked from authenticated — direct SELECT by tenant user denied.
/auth/confirm open-redirect guard — next=https://evil.com ignored, falls back /.
Internal-API CORS — disallowed Origin → 403; same-origin → Allow-Credentials: true.
Survey swipe over footer navigates (SS13) — re-confirm on a real device after deploy.
Offline draft resume opens the app (SS22) — re-confirm offline on device.
Estimate to proposal to token URL end to end (P1) — including onboarding for a fresh org.
Full job-completion pipeline reachable from CRM incl. materials/variance/review-queue (J8-J17).
Review page loads for a job with a completion (regression guard for the PGRST201 dual-FK embed).
Opportunity delete redirect goes to /crm/pipeline not legacy /pipeline (nav inconsistency).
Invitation/proposal/invoice emails silently no-op without RESEND_API_KEY — verify env in each environment.
API Keys feature end-to-end (create + revoke) once fixed (currently broken — ST9/ST10).
profiles .single() RLS trap regression — invoice send from MULTI-MEMBER org must not throw "multiple rows". Test as 2nd org member.
v1 estimate/invoice/job number collision under concurrency (count()+1) — fire two simultaneous creates, no dup number.
PostgREST .or() search injection on /v1 customers & companies — comma/paren in search can't inject filter clauses.
Uneven per-IP rate limiting across v1 (customers/companies limited, estimates/invoices/jobs not).
Invitation email deliverability — RESEND_DOMAIN unset → resend.dev sandbox sender. Verify RESEND_DOMAIN set per env.
